revision.comment: removed [[Category:6th-century BC people]]; added [[Category:6th-century BC people by continent]] using [[WP:HC|HotCat]]
1 revision imported: Mass importing wikipedia categories, not taking histories because these are unused ones and it is kind of obvious where they came from
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:making categorization show up on newly imported categories and templates]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:1 revision imported]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:1 revision imported]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] to [[Category:new pages]][[Category:new pages]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
fixing pages in [[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]]
replacing the Category
Adding [[Category:kk]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (3 members)
Text replacement - "{{DEFAULTSORT\:[^]]+}}" to ""
Bot: tidy & size tag (3 members)
Bot: remove self-membership
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Bot: remove obsolete category 6th-century BC people by continent
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with 3 members
Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
Text replacement - "[[Category fixed]]" to "[[Category:Category fixed]]"
Bot: remove obsolete category Category fixed
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Uncategorized categories
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q29551625)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵↵}}" to ""
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{Portal|Asia|Biography}}
{{Navseasoncats}}
{{CatAutoTOC}}
{{wikidata link|Q29551625}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:6th-century BC Asian people]]
[[en:Category:6th-century BC Asian people]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:sn_crud|TEST6th-century BC Asian people]]
[[Category:Asian people by century|-94]]
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=6th-century_BC_Asian_people here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]

<!--categories-->

[[Category:Asian people by century|-94]]
